extDesc.message: Write quick notes from the toolbar. Notes are saved on this device.

noteListHelp.message: In the notes list, press Tab to move between the select and delete buttons. Use the up and down arrow keys to move between notes. Press Home to move to the first note and End to move to the last note.

placeholder.message: Select a note or create a new one.

confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this note?

emptyNoteListDescription.message: Just type in the note area below to save it automatically on this device.

onboardingGuide.message: Type even one line to create your first auto-saved note.

firstNotePlaceholder.message: Write a quick thought or task here. It will be saved automatically.

emptySearchResultsDescription.message: Try a shorter search term or different words.

premiumLimit.message: The free version lets you create up to $COUNT$ notes. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited notes.
